title: geissanthus dentatus
intro: Geissanthus dentatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, commonly known as the yellow sapote or yellow guinep. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geissanthus dentatus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
